mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in retail sales indicates robust consumer demand, which translates to higher corporate earnings and thus positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If RSAFS growth is positive but SPX 20d returns are negative in more than 55% of observations over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in the unemployment rate above a critical threshold signals a weakening labor market, leading to reduced consumer spending and corporate profits, which drives S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If UNRATE rises by more than 0.5pp over 3 months, but SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 40% of such instances over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the Federal Funds Rate is low and industrial production is declining, it indicates a combination of accommodative monetary policy and weakening economic activity, which often precedes a market rebound as investors anticipate future stimulus, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: If the specified FEDFUNDS and INDPRO conditions are met, but SPX 20d returns are negative in more than 50% of occurrences over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of strong economic expansion, robust housing starts indicate healthy investment and consumer confidence, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days. This effect is diminished or reversed during contractions.
failure_condition: If HOUST shows positive growth during an expansion, but SPX 5d returns are negative in more than 55% of such instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A significant and sustained decline in industrial production signals a broad-based slowdown in manufacturing and mining, indicating weakening corporate earnings and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If INDPRO declines by more than 1.0% over 6 months, but SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 45% of such periods over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in non-farm payrolls indicates a healthy and expanding labor market, supporting consumer spending and corporate revenues, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If PAYEMS shows positive month-over-month growth, but SPX 20d returns are negative in more than 55% of observations over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation (CPIAUCSL) is rising rapidly while the unemployment rate (UNRATE) is low, it suggests an overheating economy that could prompt aggressive monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If CPIAUCSL and UNRATE conditions are met, but SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 40% of such instances over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of economic contraction, a sharp decline in GDP signals a severe economic downturn, leading to significant negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate earnings plummet.
failure_condition: If GDPC1 declines by more than 1.0% QoQ annualized, but SPX 60d returns are positive in more than 40% of such periods over any 5-year rolling window.
